infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KKamera uses the camera to capture photos and videos for direct cloud upload.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KKamera uses the microphone to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KKamera can access your photo library to upload existing photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: KKamera saves captured photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KKamera can embed location data in your photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: KKamera uses the camera to capture photos and videos for direct cloud upload.
plugins.microphonePermission: KKamera uses the microphone to record audio with your videos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: KKamera can embed GPS location in your photos.
